config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

TEXT:
A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware. At times this meant that there wasn't as much time for thought - or even imagination; instead we learned our way back into simpler thoughts via writing down sentences with less focus on what happened immediately before they went out at night (as if those weren�t still possible), not forgetting about them because most people would remember their own actions until one day everyone else remembered theirs again [21]. However, nowadays all knowledge comes from word processing rather than memory alone. So many words can already feel like fragments without any meaning whatsoever... but yet so few know how each unique sentence feels anymore[22]. Thus my last lesson here may help you understand

At times this meant that there wasn't as much time for thought - or even imagination; instead we learned our way back into simpler thoughts via writing down sentences with less focus on what happened immediately before they went out at night (as if those weren�t still possible), not forgetting about them because most people would remember their own actions until one day everyone else remembered theirs again [21].
